name: lcp
description: Universal Python library documentation for AI coding agents via the Library Context Protocol. Resolves any pip-installed package on demand — functions, classes, signatures, docstrings — through browsable MCP tools.

registries.title: LCP Registries
registries.description: Comma-separated list of LCP registry URLs. The first URL is used as the primary registry for fetching pre-built manifests. Leave empty to use only the official registry.

lcpCommand.title: lcp binary path
lcpCommand.description: Full path to an 'lcp' executable to launch the MCP server with. Use this when lcp is installed in a virtualenv/pyenv/conda env that is not on the active PATH. Leave empty to auto-detect 'lcp' (or 'python -m lcp') on PATH.

pythonPath.title: Python interpreter path
pythonPath.description: Full path to a Python interpreter that has lcp installed; the server is launched as 'python -m lcp'. Used only if 'lcp binary path' is empty. Leave empty to auto-detect.
